notes: Phase A: 459 batters, 548 pitchers, 246 injuries, 49 news items.
Phase B: 247 transactions scraped via /transactions?print_rows=9999 single-page (REPLACE mode); cleaner consolidated to 202.
Team 7 renamed: 'Whoop Whoop that's the sound of Dylan Cease' -> 'Everythings McGonigle Green'. Mapped to teamId 7 in scrape; merge_tx.py TEAM_IDS dict still has the old name and should be updated.
Player news scraper updated to parse from headline format ('Team's Firstname Lastname: ...') since players-annotated section was removed from CBS layout.
Injury scraper updated: CBS now exposes only 5-column table (no separate IL/DTD column); status code is now inferred from the 'Injury Status' text.
Period 3 in progress (2026-04-27 to 2026-05-10). Current matchup: Okamotomami 6.0 vs A Pete Crow-Armstrong Looked at Me 10.0. Standings reflect 2-0 record.
